title: Planning Commission Meets November 14th. Here’s how to weigh in….
summary: Regular Planning Commission meets November 14th, 2023. This hybrid meeting will be held in person and by remote participation. title: Arctic (and Antarctic!) Sea Ice Extent: October 26, 2023
summary: October 26 2023: The sea ice has continued to increase , at significant rate of 11.63% , from the level on 10/19/2023 of 6.848 M km 2 to 7.749 M km 2 for this week. That is the second pretty good jump in consecutive weeks with increases of 17.54% last week and 11.63% this week. Plot Compiled by: How...
